candidate_problem_record.subject: physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: As in Fig. $2.39$, what is the direction of the current in the resistor $r$ (from $A$ to $B$ or from $B$ to $A$) when the following operations are performed? In each case give a brief explanation of your reasoning? The switch $S$ is closed.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。
